name: Poppy Bank
description_short: FDIC-insured bank serving California with personal and business checking, savings, CDs, credit cards, and commercial lending services.
description_long: Poppy Bank is a California-based FDIC-insured bank that provides comprehensive banking services to both personal and business customers. The institution emphasizes its commitment to supporting local communities and economic prosperity, with a stated mission focused on meeting client banking needs while making a positive difference in the communities it serves. The bank maintains physical locations across multiple California regions including Sonoma County, Los Angeles, San Diego, Bay Area, and Sacramento based on their advertising footprint. The bank offers a full suite of personal banking products including checking accounts, savings and money market accounts, personal and IRA certificates of deposit, personal credit cards, and digital/mobile banking platforms. For business customers, Poppy Bank provides business checking accounts, savings and money market accounts, business credit cards, commercial lending, treasury management services, and additional business services. They also offer specialized products like the Poppy Blooms Youth Savings Account for younger customers and resources for homeowners facing financial challenges. Poppy Bank distinguishes itself through FDIC insurance backing, community-focused lending practices highlighted in their business spotlight content, and a commitment to supporting local businesses and nonprofits. Their website features business case studies and financial education content, suggesting a relationship-based approach rather than a purely digital-first model. The bank provides both toll-free customer service and maintains physical branch locations for in-person banking. As a regional bank, Poppy Bank likely has more limited geographic reach and potentially fewer digital conveniences compared to national online banks. Their specific product rates, fees, and competitive advantages are not detailed on the provided website content, making detailed product comparisons difficult. The bank appears positioned for California residents and businesses seeking community-oriented banking with traditional personal service.
services: Personal savings and money market accounts
Personal and IRA certificates of deposit
Business savings and money market accounts
pros: FDIC-insured deposits backed by full faith and credit of U.S. Government
Comprehensive product suite including checking, savings, CDs, credit cards, and commercial lending
Multiple physical locations across California regions for in-person banking
Specialized offerings like youth savings accounts (Poppy Blooms) and homeowner assistance programs
Dedicated treasury management and commercial lending teams for business customers
Community-focused lending with published business spotlights and local impact initiatives
Mobile and digital banking platforms alongside traditional service options
cons: Geographic limitation to California only, not available nationwide
Specific interest rates, APYs, and fee schedules not disclosed on website
Limited information about product competitiveness versus national and online banks
No mention of specialized services like investment management or wealth advisory
Online account opening process details not fully transparent on website

contact.address: 111 Santa Rosa Avenue, Santa Rosa, CA 95404

best_for: California-based small business owners seeking relationship-based commercial banking
Local individuals and families preferring branch-based banking with community connection
Parents looking for youth savings products with financial education focus
Homeowners needing financial assistance programs and mortgage-related services
diagnosis: Poppy Bank is best suited for California residents and small-to-medium businesses seeking full-service banking with community relationships and local branch access. The primary caveat is limited geographic availability outside California and lack of publicly disclosed competitive rates, requiring direct contact to compare products against national alternatives.
typical_results_timeline: Account opening typically takes 1-3 business days. Loan decisions vary by product.
address: 111 Santa Rosa Avenue, Santa Rosa, CA 95404
